notes: Simple login page with clean HTML form. Standard email/password fields with submit. Links to registration and password recovery. Minimal JavaScript complexity. Well-labeled form elements.

endpoints.label: Login Form
endpoints.description: Email/phone + password login form with Sign In button

endpoints.label: Join Now
endpoints.description: Link to LinkedIn registration / sign-up page

endpoints.label: Sign in with Google
endpoints.description: Google OAuth sign-in button for single sign-on

endpoints.label: Footer Links
endpoints.description: Footer navigation: About, Accessibility, User Agreement, Privacy Policy, etc.

endpoints.label: Cookie Consent Banner
endpoints.description: Cookie consent banner with Accept/Deny buttons (artdeco-global-alert COOKIE_CONSENT)
